fields.description: When enabled, users cannot create or save a Room Reservation with a check-in date earlier than today.
fields.label: Block Backdated Booking
Tax Config Help
fields.options:
Define GST slabs for room accommodation. The reservation picks the matching slab based on the average room rate per night.
Max Tariff = 0 means no upper limit (highest slab). Leave the Item Tax Template blank for an exempt slab.

fields.description: Standard hotel billing items (Room Charge, Meal Plans, Laundry, Spa, etc.) have been imported into the system.
fields.label: Items Imported

fields.description: Creates standard hotel billing items with SAC codes and GST rates. This action cannot be undone — items must be deleted manually if no longer needed.
fields.label: Import Standard Billing Items
